name: Zylo
description: Enterprise SaaS management platform that discovers applications, tracks SaaS spend and usage, and optimizes licenses and renewals for IT, procurement, and finance teams.

details.targetMarket: IT, Procurement, Finance, SAM and FinOps teams at mid-market and large enterprise organizations

items: AI-powered Discovery Engine for continuous SaaS detection
Automated application categorization and system of record
Library of application profiles and metadata
Continuous spend visibility and dashboards
Portfolio & pricing benchmarks
Cost allocation and budget tracking
Spend analytics and reporting
Usage-based license optimization recommendations
Renewal tracking and milestone management
Automated alerts for wasted or unused licenses
SaaS Negotiator and procurement support services
Access and permission controls for governance
Audit-ready compliance and vendor risk insights
Multi-instance support and sandbox environments for enterprise governance
Direct integrations and usage data connections (SSO/IAM, financial systems, ITSM)
Actions for Okta and Microsoft Entra, ITSM automations (Jira)
Full CRUD API for integrations and automation
Managed Services (procurement, negotiations, SaaS operations)
Professional Services and dedicated CSM support
Benchmarks as a Service and expert negotiation assistance

missingFeatures: Transparent, self-serve pricing and lower-cost tiers for SMBs and teams
More granular, real-time ingestion and normalization for consumption-based/variable billing models
Automated remediation capabilities (e.g., auto-revoke or suspend unused licenses) beyond alerts
Broader out-of-the-box connectors for niche/vertical SaaS vendors and telemetry sources
Public, developer-friendly documentation and a self-serve sandbox for evaluation

pricingPlans.name: Zylo Core
pricingPlans.note: Entry platform for building a SaaS system of record; contact sales

pricingPlans.name: Zylo Premium
pricingPlans.note: Adds benchmarks, automations, APIs and scaled operations; contact sales

pricingPlans.name: Zylo Enterprise
pricingPlans.note: Enterprise features, multi-instance support, premium security and governance; contact sales

strengths: Market leadership and large data footprint (Zylo cites tens of millions of licenses and tens of billions in spend processed)
AI/ML-powered discovery and classification tuned for SaaS portfolios
Strong enterprise integrations, governance features, and managed services (procurement/negotiation)
Recognized by analysts (Gartner Leader and Customers’ Choice in recent reports)
weaknesses: No transparent public pricing — can deter smaller buyers and slows evaluation
Platform/implementation complexity can require professional services and longer time-to-value
Less visible public documentation and self-serve evaluation options compared with more product-led competitors
